subject: 10 Priority Outreach Emails - Ceremonial Electronics
body:
FLUTUR - Priority Outreach Emails v2

Positioning: Ceremonial Electronics - From Stillness to Movement

EMAIL 1: GIARDINO DEI VISIONARI (Rebecca) - PRIORITY 1

To: Info@giardinodeivisionari.com
Subject: House of Mantra - Ceremonial Electronics Live

Ciao Rebecca, Sono FLUTUR. Creo quello che chiamo 'ceremonial electronics' - sound journey che partono dal silenzio del RAV Vast e costruiscono layer su layer fino a frequenze che muovono il corpo. Dal meditativo all'estatico, live. Ho visto House of Mantra e la vostra visione di unire yoga, meditazione e musica come esperienza trasformativa - è esattamente il mio territorio. Background: - Main stage Drishti Beats Festival 2023 (Aspen, Colorado) - invitato da IHF dopo opening a Denver - 4 anni di sunset ceremonies a Villa Porta, Lago Maggiore - RAV Vast Endorsed Artist - Collab con Equanimous (Gravitas Recordings, 100M+ streams) Il mio setup: RAV Vast + voce + chitarra + Ableton Push. Posso creare un arco completo - dalla meditazione al movimento - o adattarmi al momento. → https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4 Mi piacerebbe creare qualcosa insieme per House of Mantra. FLUTUR

EMAIL 2: ECSTATIC DANCE BERLIN - PRIORITY 2

To: ecstaticdanceberlin@gmail.com
Subject: RAV Vast Live - Opening/Cooldown/Full Journey

Hello, I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist creating what I call 'ceremonial electronics' - live sound journeys that range from meditative stillness to ecstatic movement. I'm interested in contributing to ED Berlin in any format: - Cooldown/integration: Gentle RAV Vast sound healing (15-20 min) - Opening warmup: Building from stillness (15-20 min) - Full journey: Complete arc from meditation to melodic deep (45-60 min) Background: - Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Colorado) - invited by IHF - 4-year sunset ceremony residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore) - RAV Vast Endorsed Artist - Collab with Equanimous (Gravitas, 100M+ streams) Setup: RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push. One-man orchestra, fully live. → https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4 Available for trial dates. Best, FLUTUR

EMAIL 3: ED ROTTERDAM

To: via ecstaticdancerotterdam.nl
Subject: RAV Vast Artist - Guest Rotation

Hello, I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast player creating 'ceremonial electronics' - live journeys from meditation to movement. I noticed ED Rotterdam incorporates handpan in cooldown - the RAV Vast has a unique tonal quality with deeper overtones. I'd love to contribute as guest rotation or for full sound journeys. I can offer: - Cooldown integration (15-20 min) - Full journey arc: stillness → build → melodic deep → integration (45-60 min) Credentials: - Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (invited by IHF) - 4-year sunset ceremony residency - RAV Vast Endorsed Artist - Equanimous collab (Gravitas, 100M+ streams) Setup: RAV Vast + voice + guitar + Ableton Push. Fully live, layer by layer. → https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4 Best, FLUTUR

EMAIL 4: THE SHANTI SPACE (Portugal)

To: info@theshantispace.com
Subject: Sound Journey Facilitator

Hello, I'm FLUTUR, a RAV Vast endorsed artist creating 'ceremonial electronics' - live sound journeys for meditation, yoga, and ecstatic dance. I discovered your monthly ED and Kirtan events - the woodland sanctuary setting resonates deeply with my work. For 4 years I created sunset ceremonies for luxury hotel guests, learning to read and guide group energy. I can offer: - Sound journey for ED opening/cooldown - Dedicated sound healing evening - Yoga accompaniment with live RAV Vast + looping - Full ceremonial arc: stillness → ecstatic → integration Credentials: - Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE - Villa Porta - 4 years sunset ceremonies - RAV Vast Endorsed Artist - Equanimous collab (Gravitas Recordings) → https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4 Warm regards, FLUTUR

EMAIL 5: KUMHARAS (Ibiza)

To: kumharas.org/contact
Phone: +34 971 80 57 40
Subject: Live Looping Sunset Sessions

Hello, I'm FLUTUR, a live looping artist creating 'ceremonial electronics' - sunset journeys from world music meditation to organic melodic deep. Kumharas' 30-year legacy of alternative cultures and word-of-mouth discovery resonates with how I work. I create full arrangements solo, building layer by layer from RAV Vast meditation to driving rhythms. Setup: RAV Vast + acoustic/electric guitar + vocals + Ableton Push. One-man orchestra, adaptable 30-90 min. Credentials: - Drishti Beats Festival 2023 MAIN STAGE (Aspen, Colorado) - Opening for IHF at Your Mom's House Denver (IHF played Coachella, Electric Forest, LiB) - 4-year sunset residency (Villa Porta, Lake Maggiore) - RAV Vast Endorsed Artist Available summer 2026. → https://youtu.be/I-lpfRHTSG4 Best, FLUTUR

EMAIL 6: SUNSET ASHRAM (Ibiza)

Phone: +34 661 347 222
Subject: Solo Live Act - Sunset Sessions

Similar format - emphasize artistic freedom, live looping, surprise/freshness

EMAIL 7: NALU ATHENS

To: info@nalu.gr
Subject: Live World Music for Sunset

Available May-Sept 2026, contact March for bookings

EMAIL 8: EVOLVE FESTIVAL

To: evolve-festival.com application
Subject: Workshop + Performance Application

100% sober festival, apply Sept-Nov for Aug 2026

EMAIL 9: PANGONIA HANDPAN FESTIVAL

To: pangonia.de
Subject: RAV Vast Performance + Workshop

July 15-19, 2026

EMAIL 10: SCORPIOS

To: scorpios.com/booking-request

⚠️ ONLY after building momentum elsewhere - ETNA is resident

KEY NOTES

  • Rebecca (Giardino): Approach as facilitator, not performer. She filters before ETNA.
  • ED Berlin: Dedicated sound healing slot at 10 PM
  • ED Rotterdam: PeTro already books handpan for cooldown
  • Kumharas: Word of mouth venue - call or visit off-season
